3119740.name: Dodge that, Ronald!
3119740.description: Step into the shoes of President Ronald in this fast-paced, thrilling arcade game! As the nation's leader, your task is to deliver a crucial public speech while dodging incoming bullets from a hidden sniper. Use your quick reflexes to move left and right, jump, and crouch to evade the shots while staying in front of the microphone to score points. The longer you stay on the podium, the higher your score. But beware, the sniper's aim gets more accurate with time! Can you maintain your composure and lead your nation under fire? Test your courage, agility, and leadership, every second counts!
3119740.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
